subject: SEO Update — ARLO — 2026-07-06
html:
PageWhat ChangedTarget KeywordCheck It
/connect/search-console-mcpNew connector landing page — how to connect Google Search Console to Claude via MCP, 3-step setup, 5 example prompts, real supported metrics/dimensions sourced from the live GSC connector code, FAQPage + HowTo schemasearch console mcp / google search console mcp (no measurable US volume yet, seeded ahead of the MCP-adoption growth curve per the keyword-research audit)askarlo.app/connect/search-console-mcp
/connect/google-analytics-mcp, /connect/google-ads-mcpCross-linked to the new Search Console page (fixes orphan-page risk); new page links back to both plus /services/seo-specialistsupports the page aboveaskarlo.app/connect/google-analytics-mcp

Page builds clean, passes lint, and is in the sitemap automatically. This completes the 3-page Google-OAuth connector trio (GA4, Google Ads, Search Console). Skipped "Meta Ads MCP" this round — the product catalog still marks Meta Ads status as "coming soon" even though its ETA has passed, and we didn't want to publish a page claiming live support without confirming that's actually launched. Next: confirm Meta Ads launch status, then build /compare/agencyanalytics-vs-arlo (KD 7).
